#  Security Robots For a Safer World
[ Explore ](https://enovarobotics.eu/pguard/) [ Request a Quote ](https://www.enovarobotics.eu/contact/)
###  PGuard
PGuard is a rugged security robot for multi-terrain applications. PGuard is fully autonomous and self-driving gathering significant amounts of data from the environment in real-time and deters negative behavior. PGuard provides security professionals with a force multiplier through an interface to review events generated from smart “eyes and ears”.
####  Patrol
Secured navigation in autonomous mode or remote-controlled mode.
####  Survey
Real-time video and audio streaming. Remote communication via microphone and speakers systems.
####  Detect
Autonomous intrusion and anomaly detection using artificial intelligence algorithms.
####  Alert
Alert transmission to the controlling interface. Pre-registered message or live interpellation via PGuard loudspeakers.
You want to see PGuard in action
[ Book a demo ](http://www.enovarobotics.eu/bookademo/)
###  PGuard
A new kind of guard that will improve your monitoring facility and will easily be integrated to your current security system.
"It's always a pleasure to work with Enova Robotics team. They are personable, responsive, and results-oriented!"
![](https://enovarobotics.eu/wp-content/uploads/2020/03/hichemturki-394x394.jpg)
Hichem Turki
General Manager Novation City

tavily.answer: Enova Robotics is a Tunisian robotics startup founded by Anis Sahbani, raised $1.6 million in funding, and specializes in mobile robot design and manufacturing.
